headline: Tyson Foods to end production at US “prepared foods” plant
summary: “The facility has operated under a unique single-customer model, but recent changes have made continued operations at the site no longer viable,” Tyson said.

raw.headline: Tyson Foods to end production at US “prepared foods” plant
raw.summary: “The facility has operated under a unique single-customer model, but recent changes have made continued operations at the site no longer viable,” Tyson said.

headline: Grocery shock on the horizon for approaching U.S. elections as Iran war drags on
summary: "It just pisses them off more," said Rep. Vicente Gonzalez, D-Texas, said in an interview when asked about how voters will react if food gets more expensive.

raw.headline: Grocery shock on the horizon for approaching U.S. elections as Iran war drags on
raw.summary: "It just pisses them off more," said Rep. Vicente Gonzalez, D-Texas, said in an interview when asked about how voters will react if food gets more expensive.

headline: Ulta names chief strategy, growth officer
summary: The beauty retailer promoted Kristin Wolf, who has worked at the company since 2019, to the C-suite position.

raw.headline: Ulta names chief strategy, growth officer
raw.summary: The beauty retailer promoted Kristin Wolf, who has worked at the company since 2019, to the C-suite position.
